name: CodeMunch Pro
description: Intelligent code indexing MCP server. Tree-sitter AST extraction, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector), call graphs, 10 languages, incremental indexing. Save 99% of tokens with O(1) byte-offset symbol retrieval.

tools.name: index_folder
tools.description: Index a local directory using tree-sitter AST parsing. Supports 10 languages with incremental indexing.

tools.name: index_repo
tools.description: Index a GitHub or GitLab repository by cloning it locally.

tools.name: list_repos
tools.description: List all indexed repositories with stats.

tools.name: invalidate_cache
tools.description: Force re-index a repository by clearing its cache.

tools.name: file_tree
tools.description: Get directory tree of an indexed repository with file counts.

tools.name: file_outline
tools.description: List all symbols in a single file ordered by line number.

tools.name: repo_outline
tools.description: List all symbols in the repository (summary view).

tools.name: get_symbol
tools.description: Get full source code of a symbol via O(1) byte-offset seek. Saves 99% tokens vs reading entire files.

tools.name: get_symbols
tools.description: Batch get source code for multiple symbols at once.

tools.name: search_symbols
tools.description: Hybrid search across symbols using FTS5 keyword + vector semantic similarity with Reciprocal Rank Fusion.

tools.name: search_text
tools.description: Full-text search in file contents. Find string literals, comments, config values.

tools.name: get_callees
tools.description: Get what a function calls (outgoing call graph edges) with depth traversal.

tools.name: get_callers
tools.description: Get who calls a function (incoming call graph edges) with depth traversal.
